sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INTEGER, ts TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, ts) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '-infinity');
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, ts) VALUES (2, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 00:00:00+00');
SELECT id, isinf(ts) FROM test_timestamps WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_timestamps SET ts = TIMESTAMPTZ 'infinity' WHERE id = 2;
